rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Stay Accounting Hearings And Opposition To Extraordinary Fees Pending Findings Of A Civil Complaint For Fraud And Breach Of Contract
rulings.Rulings: The motion to stay accounting hearings is denied. Any party who wishes to argue the tentative must notify the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel no later than 5:00 p.m. on 4/16/14. Prevailing party to prepare order.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: ESTATE OF ALICE J. WHITE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion And M.P.A. In Support Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Declararion Of J. Harris In Oppsition To D'Andre White'S Petition For Probate Of Will Amd For Letters Testamentary.
rulings.Rulings: Certain portions of the Declaration of Jamal Harris shall be stricken based on hearsay and foundational grounds. The parties are ordered to appear for argument on April 17, 2014, at 2:00 p.m. If possible, they should meet and confer to decide whether there are any portions that can be stipulated as stricken.
